intent_nl: Look at the input's "kind" field and return the matching fruit name: "Apple" for kind "a" and "Banana" for kind "b".

coverage.description: Happy path: the corpus example's own data/result pair re-executed through the pinned engine (AD-021 corpus pair).

Key deletion: the corpus data with root key "kind" removed (OQ-026b).
